category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a code generator for OpenAPI specs; official README says Create API generates Swift code from OpenAPI specs: https://github.com/CreateAPI/CreateAPI#readme

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify OpenAPI-based Swift code generation and the create-api generate command: https://github.com/CreateAPI/CreateAPI#readme
